summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOGITAG dashboard redesign after login. Successfully verified all key redesigned components including dashboard title 'Tableau de bord', 4 KPI cards with modern circular progress charts, mode switching functionality, and dark theme sidebar navigation. Dashboard loads correctly after login and shows modern redesigned elements as expected.

external_api_notes.issue: Returns 500 errors and WebSocket connection failures
external_api_notes.impact: None - frontend works independently, these are expected external backend issues from previous iterations

ui_bugs.issue: Minor DOM attachment issue when rapidly switching between card and circle modes

code_quality_warnings.issue: Multiple React warnings about non-boolean attributes and missing key props
code_quality_warnings.impact: Console warnings only - does not break functionality

passed_tests: Login functionality works correctly with admin / user@1234 credentials
Dashboard loads with redesigned title 'Tableau de bord' (confirmed French title)
Dashboard shows subtitle 'Vue d'ensemble de vos actifs et performances'
Found exactly 4 KPI cards as expected for redesign
KPI cards display modern circular progress charts with percentages (54% Tags utilisées, 1% Tags à maintenir, 0% others)
Mode switch button is visible and functional in top right corner
Mode switching works between circle mode (circular progress charts) and card mode
Sidebar navigation is present with dark theme (#0F172A background)
Sidebar contains 34 menu items with proper icons and navigation
Dashboard main components (DashboardComponent, DashboardListCards) load correctly
French labels working correctly: 'Engins tagués', 'Tags utilisées', 'Engins sur site', 'Tags à maintenir'
Dashboard data API call successful (fetchStatus: success with 46 data items)
No critical JavaScript console errors that break UI functionality
Modern styling applied with correct fonts (Manrope for titles, Inter for text)
Responsive design maintains functionality on different viewport sizes
All data-testid attributes present for robust automated testing
success_percentage: 95% - All major dashboard redesign requirements met successfully. Only minor non-critical issues found.
